label: Fly.io
description: Arcade tools designed for LLMs to interact with Fly.io

tools.name: AddCertificate
tools.description: Add a TLS certificate for a hostname and return the DNS records to set.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app to add the certificate to.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The custom domain hostname to provision TLS for.

tools.name: AllocateIpAddress
tools.description: Allocate a new IP address for an app.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app to allocate the IP address for.

parameters.name: ip_type
parameters.description: Kind of IP address to allocate (dedicated v4/v6, shared v4, or private v6).

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Three-letter region code for a regional address. Leave empty for a global address.

tools.name: CheckCertificate
tools.description: Check a certificate's validation status and any pending DNS records.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app the certificate belongs to.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname whose certificate to check.

tools.name: CreateMachine
tools.description: Create a new Machine for an app from a container image.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app to add the Machine to.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: Container image reference to run, including tag.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Three-letter region code to place the Machine in. Leave empty to let Fly.io choose.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name for the new Machine. Leave empty to auto-generate one.

parameters.name: vm_size
parameters.description: VM-size preset for the Machine. Leave unset for the Fly.io default size.

parameters.name: env
parameters.description: Environment variables to set on the Machine, as name/value pairs.

tools.name: CreateVolume
tools.description: Create a new persistent volume for an app.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app to create the volume for.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name for the new volume (letters, numbers, underscores).

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Three-letter region code to place the volume in.

parameters.name: size_gb
parameters.description: Size of the volume in gigabytes.

tools.name: DeployApp
tools.description: Roll a new container image out to all of an app's Machines.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app to roll the new image out to.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: Container image reference to deploy, including tag.

parameters.name: strategy
parameters.description: How to replace the app's Machines with the new image. Defaults to ROLLING (one Machine at a time).

tools.name: DestroyMachine
tools.description: Permanently destroy a Machine. Stop it first unless force is set.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app the Machine belongs to.

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The id of the Machine to destroy.

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Destroy the Machine even if it is still running. When false, a running Machine must be stopped first. Defaults to false.

tools.name: DestroyVolume
tools.description: Permanently destroy a volume and the data it holds.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app the volume belongs to.

parameters.name: volume_id
parameters.description: The id of the volume to destroy.

tools.name: ExtendVolume
tools.description: Grow a volume to a larger size. Volumes cannot be shrunk.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app the volume belongs to.

parameters.name: volume_id
parameters.description: The id of the volume to extend.

parameters.name: size_gb
parameters.description: New size of the volume in gigabytes. Must be larger than the current size.

tools.name: GetApp
tools.description: Get the current status of a single Fly.io app.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The name of the app to inspect.

tools.name: GetLogs
tools.description:
Read recent historical log entries for an app, optionally filtered.

Reading logs requires a token granted log-read access, which is a capability
separate from app management; a token without it cannot read logs at all. When
that access is missing this returns a ``no_access`` result rather than raising,
so prefer branching on the result's ``status`` over assuming logs are present.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app whose recent logs to read.

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: Only return logs from this Machine instance. Leave empty for all Machines.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Only return logs from this three-letter region code. Leave empty for all regions.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of log entries to return (1-500). Defaults to 100.

parameters.name: next_token
parameters.description: Opaque cursor from a previous call to fetch the next page. Leave empty to start from the most recent entries.

tools.name: GetMachine
tools.description: Get the configuration, state, and health of a single Machine.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app the Machine belongs to.

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The id of the Machine to inspect.

tools.name: ListApps
tools.description:
List Fly.io apps, optionally scoped to a single organization.

Apps are returned in Fly.io's own ordering, with pagination metadata so a
caller can tell when more apps exist beyond the returned window.

parameters.name: organization_slug
parameters.description: Restrict the listing to apps in this organization (its slug). Leave empty to list every app the configured token can access.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum apps to return (1-200). Defaults to 50.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: 0-indexed position in the org's app list to start from. Defaults to 0.

tools.name: ListCertificates
tools.description: List the custom-domain TLS certificates configured on an app.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app whose certificates to list.

tools.name: ListIpAddresses
tools.description: List the IP addresses assigned to an app, including the shared IPv4.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app whose IP addresses to list.

tools.name: ListMachines
tools.description: List the Machines that belong to an app.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app whose Machines to list.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Only include Machines in this three-letter region code. Leave empty for all regions.

parameters.name: include_deleted
parameters.description: Include destroyed Machines in the listing. Defaults to false.

tools.name: ListOrganizations
tools.description: List the Fly.io organizations the configured token can access.

tools.name: ListRegions
tools.description: List the Fly.io regions available for deploying apps and volumes.

tools.name: ListReleases
tools.description: List an app's release history, newest first.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app whose release history to list.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of releases to return (1-100). Defaults to 25. Newest releases are returned first.

tools.name: ListSecrets
tools.description: List an app's secret names. Secret values are never returned by Fly.io.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app whose secret names to list.

tools.name: ListVolumes
tools.description: List the persistent volumes that belong to an app.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app whose volumes to list.

parameters.name: include_destroyed
parameters.description: Include volumes that are being torn down or already destroyed. Defaults to false, so the listing shows only live volumes.

tools.name: ReleaseIpAddress
tools.description: Release a dedicated IP address so it is no longer assigned to the app.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app the IP address belongs to.

parameters.name: ip_address_id
parameters.description: The id of the IP address to release.

tools.name: RemoveCertificate
tools.description: Remove a custom-domain TLS certificate from an app.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app the certificate belongs to.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname whose certificate to remove.

tools.name: RestartMachine
tools.description: Restart a Machine and report its settled state.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app the Machine belongs to.

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The id of the Machine to restart.

tools.name: ScaleMachineCount
tools.description: Scale an app to a target Machine count by adding or removing Machines.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app to scale.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Target number of Machines the app should run (0 or more). Machines are created or destroyed to reach this count.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Scale within this three-letter region code only, leaving other regions untouched. Leave empty to scale the whole app.

tools.name: ScaleVmSize
tools.description: Change the VM size or memory of an app's Machines.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app whose Machines to resize.

parameters.name: vm_size
parameters.description: VM-size preset to apply. Provide this, or memory_mb, or both. Leave unset to keep the current CPU configuration and only change memory.

parameters.name: memory_mb
parameters.description: Override the memory in megabytes, independent of the preset. Leave unset to use the preset's default memory.

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: Resize only this Machine. Leave empty to resize every Machine in the app.

tools.name: SetSecrets
tools.description: Set one or more app secrets, optionally rolling them out immediately.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app to set secrets on.

parameters.name: secrets
parameters.description: Secret name/value pairs to set. Existing names are overwritten in place.

parameters.name: deploy
parameters.description: Roll the change out immediately by restarting the app's Machines so the new values take effect. When false, the values are stored for the next restart or deploy. Defaults to true.

tools.name: StartMachine
tools.description: Start a stopped Machine and report its settled state.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app the Machine belongs to.

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The id of the Machine to start.

tools.name: StopMachine
tools.description: Stop a started Machine and report its settled state.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app the Machine belongs to.

parameters.name: machine_id
parameters.description: The id of the Machine to stop.

parameters.name: signal
parameters.description: Signal to send the Machine's main process. Leave unset for the Fly.io default (SIGINT, then SIGKILL).

tools.name: UnsetSecrets
tools.description: Remove one or more app secrets, optionally rolling the change out immediately.

parameters.name: app_name
parameters.description: The app to remove secrets from.

parameters.name: keys
parameters.description: Names of the secrets to remove.

parameters.name: deploy
parameters.description: Roll the change out immediately by restarting the app's Machines so the removal takes effect. When false, the removal is applied on the next restart or deploy. Defaults to true.

summary:
Fly.io toolkit for Arcade enables LLMs to fully manage Fly.io infrastructure via the Fly.io API — apps, machines, volumes, networking, secrets, certificates, and deployments.

## Capabilities

- **App & release management:** List, inspect, and deploy apps across organizations; browse full release history and roll out new container images to all machines.
- **Machine lifecycle:** Create, start, stop, restart, and destroy individual machines; scale machine count or change VM size/memory fleet-wide.
- **Persistent storage:** Create, extend, and destroy volumes; list volumes per app. (Note: volumes can only grow, not shrink.)
- **Networking & TLS:** Allocate and release dedicated IP addresses; add, check, and remove custom-domain TLS certificates with DNS record guidance.
- **Secrets management:** Set, unset, and list app secret names (values are never exposed by Fly.io); optional immediate rollout on changes.
- **Observability & metadata:** Read recent app logs (requires a log-read–scoped token; returns `no_access` status when access is missing rather than raising), list organizations, regions, and available infrastructure options.

## Secrets

`FLYIO_ACCESS_TOKEN` — A Fly.io personal access token (or scoped deploy/org token) used to authenticate all API calls. Obtain it from the [Fly.io dashboard Tokens page](https://fly.io/user/personal_access_tokens) or by running `fly tokens create deploy -a <app-name>` (for a deploy-scoped token) or `fly auth token` (for your personal token) via the [flyctl CLI](https://fly.io/docs/flyctl/tokens/). For log access (`Flyio.GetLogs`), the token must additionally carry log-read permission; a deploy token without this permission will cause log reads to return a `no_access` status. If you need org-wide access, generate a token scoped to the organization from the Fly.io dashboard under **Organization Settings → Tokens**.

Store the token in Arcade at [https://api.arcade.dev/dashboard/auth/secrets](https://api.arcade.dev/dashboard/auth/secrets). For details on configuring secrets in Arcade tools, see [https://docs.arcade.dev/en/guides/create-tools/tool-basics/create-tool-secrets](https://docs.arcade.dev/en/guides/create-tools/tool-basics/create-tool-secrets).
